---
format: html
---

```{r}
#| error: false
    
    file_names <- c(
        "data-import",
        "data-transformation",
        "data-visualization",
        "factors",
        "lubridate",
        "positron",
        "purrr",
        "quarto",
        "rmarkdown",
        "rstudio-ide",
        "shiny",
        "strings",
        "tidyr"
    ) |>
        paste0(".pdf")
    
    for(file in file_names){
        download.file(paste0("https://rstudio.github.io/cheatsheets/", file), file)
    }
```
